caption: In a large, well-lit indoor ballroom with a high ceiling and ornate chandeliers, several people are practicing movements on a blue carpeted floor. A man in a blue traditional Chinese-style outfit is the central figure, moving across the floor with a fluid, rhythmic gait. Another person, dressed in a similar purple outfit, moves in the background. To the side, a woman in white clothing also performs movements, while a man in black is seen transitioning through the scene. In the far background, a crowd of spectators sits at tables, watching the demonstration. As time progresses, the man in blue advances toward the right side of the frame, his limbs shifting as he executes a sequence of steps. The purple-clad practitioner also moves across the space, and the person in white shifts their position slightly, maintaining a consistent flow of movement within the spacious hall.
